case_title: GARCIA, GERARDO TOBANCHEZ vs. BARRIOS, ELIO DBA BARRIOS JANITORIAL SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, GERARDO TOBANCHEZ AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, ELIO DBA BARRIOS JANITORIAL SERVICES BARRIOS, MARTHA DBA BARRIOS JANITORIAL SERVICES BARRIOS, ELIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, GERARDO TOBANCHEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRIOS, ELIO DBA BARRIOS JANITORIAL SERVICES BARRIOS, MARTHA DBA BARRIOS JANITORIAL SERVICES BARRIOS, ELIO $1,260.43 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,340.43
